channel.title: John the Ripper on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in John the Ripper on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Fowsniff — Credential Harvesting & Password Cracking
item.description: Objective: To exfiltrate and crack leaked credentials from unencrypted data sources to perform authenticated service attacks.

item.title: Offline Cryptanalysis & Password Recovery
item.description: Objective: To utilize high-performance cracking tools to perform a dictionary attack against stolen MD5 hashes, successfully recovering plaintext credentials.
